untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Right-Angled Ascending Broadening Formation with horizontal base and up-sloping trend line) cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicators. Requires multi-bar pattern recognition and trend line identification. The signal relies on visual pattern formation with specific geometric properties (horizontal support, rising resistance, rounding over behavior) that need structural pattern detection rather than indicator-based rules.
translation_notes: Signal describes a chart pattern requiring trend line and support/resistance level identification. Attempted to capture the core SHORT bias on downward breakout with volume confirmation and exit on recovery above moving average, but the actual pattern formation conditions are untranslatable with available indicator set.
